headline: Pharma heavyweights clash over anti-obesity drug ads
summary: Danish pharmaceuticals heavyweight Novo Nordisk said Tuesday it is suing its arch US rival, Eli Lilly, over "false and materially misleading" adverts for their competing weight-loss and anti-diabetes treatments. Novo Nordisk has developed a molecule called semaglutide, while Eli Lilly developed rival molecule tirzepatide.

content.title: Pharma heavyweights clash over anti-obesity drug ads
content.summary: Danish pharmaceuticals heavyweight Novo Nordisk said Tuesday it is suing its arch US rival, Eli Lilly, over "false and materially misleading" adverts for their competing weight-loss and anti-diabetes treatments. Novo Nordisk has developed a molecule called semaglutide, while Eli Lilly developed rival molecule tirzepatide.

thumbnail.caption: Anti-obesity treatments have been a financial windfall for Novo Nordisk and Eli Lily (SEBASTIEN BOZON)

headline: Novo Nordisk sues Eli Lilly in high-stakes GLP-1 advertising feud
summary: Investing.com -- The clash between pharma titans Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly just escalated from the pharmacy counter to the courtroom. Novo Nordisk Inc. filed a lawsuit in the U.S. District Court for the District of New Jersey against Eli Lilly and Company and Lilly USA, LLC, alleging multiple violations of federal and state false advertising and unfair competition laws under the Lanham Act. The lawsuit takes aim at Lilly’s aggressive direct-to-consumer (DTC) advertising campaigns for its blockb

headline: Novo Nordisk takes action to stop multiple misleading national GLP-1 advertising campaigns by Eli Lilly
summary: A lawsuit, filed today in federal court, challenges a nationwide pattern of deceptive advertising which confuses consumers by using outdated studies to compare the highest injectable doses of Lilly's medicines against lower doses of Novo Nordisk's injectable medicines for obesity and type 2 diabetesThese high-profile US advertising campaigns create the misleading impression that Lilly’s medicines are superior, including by withholding critical scientific evidence about newer, more effective FDA-

headline: Novo sues Lilly, alleging ‘misleading’ advertising of obesity drugs
summary: The lawsuit follows a cease-and-desist request and argues Lilly is using “deceptive” ads to claim its GLP-1 products are broadly superior to Novo’s medicines. Lilly countered that its campaign is “truthful.”

content.title: Novo sues Lilly, alleging ‘misleading’ advertising of obesity drugs
content.summary: The lawsuit follows a cease-and-desist request and argues Lilly is using “deceptive” ads to claim its GLP-1 products are broadly superior to Novo’s medicines. Lilly countered that its campaign is “truthful.”

thumbnail.caption: An injection pen containing semaglutide, the active ingredient in Wegovy and Ozempic, rests on a plate in this photo illustration.
